holdings.infoBox: SEA is an equity ETF with a total of 29 individual holdings. The top holdings are DHT Holdings stock at 5.43%, COSCO SHIPPING Holdings at 5.16%, SITC International Holdings Company at 5.10%, Orient Overseas (International) at 5.05%, and International Seaways at 5.00%.

overview.description: The U.S. Global Sea to Sky Cargo ETF (SEA) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the U.S. Global Sea to Sky Cargo index. The fund tracks an index of water and air cargo companies from around the world. Stocks are weighted in fixed tiers, taking into consideration composite scores based on fundamental factors. SEA was launched on Jan 20, 2022 and is issued by US Global Investors.
infoTable: U.S. Global Sea to Sky Cargo Index
